traits.name: Fallible Invisibility
traits.text: The skulk is invisible. This invisibility can be circumvented by three things: Charnel Candles: The skulk appears as a dim, translucent form in the light of a candle made of fat rendered from a corpse whose identity is unknown. Children: Humanoid children, aged 10 and under, can see through this invisibility. Reflective Surfaces: The skulk appears as a drab, smooth-skinned biped if its reflection can be seen in a mirror or on another surface.

traits.name: Trackless
traits.text: The skulk leaves no tracks to indicate where it has been or where it's headed.
